mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_user (shop_id, subject, display_name, email, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{subject}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO staff_user_role (shop_id, subject, role) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{subject}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT u.shop_id, u.subject, u.display_name, u.email, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, r.role FROM staff_user u JOIN staff_user_role r ON r.shop_id = u.shop_id AND r.subject = u.subject WHERE u.shop_id = #{shopId} AND u.subject = #{subject}
